creator: emanuelt@gmail.com
text:
I need to upgrade my PHP5 and I get...

NEEDS UPDATING
php5-5.1.6                          <   needs updating (port has 5.1.6_1)

so I try to upgrade it.

r00t@/home/emanuel/updates#portupgrade -cvDk php5
--->  Session started at: Fri, 13 Oct 2006 16:32:07 +0000
--->  Upgrade of lang/php5 started at: Fri, 13 Oct 2006 16:32:16 +0000
--->  Upgrading 'php5-5.1.6' to 'php5-5.1.6_1' (lang/php5)
--->  Build of lang/php5 started at: Fri, 13 Oct 2006 16:32:16 +0000
--->  Building '/usr/ports/lang/php5'
===>  Cleaning for autoconf-2.59_2
===>  Cleaning for pkg-config-0.21
===>  Cleaning for libxml2-2.6.26
===>  Cleaning for perl-5.8.8
===>  Cleaning for m4-1.4.4
===>  Cleaning for help2man-1.36.4_1
===>  Cleaning for gmake-3.81_1
===>  Cleaning for libiconv-1.9.2_2
===>  Cleaning for p5-gettext-1.05_1
===>  Cleaning for gettext-0.14.5_2
===>  Cleaning for libtool-1.5.22_2
===>  Cleaning for php5-5.1.6_1
===>  php5-5.1.6_1 has known vulnerabilities:
=> php -- open_basedir Race Condition Vulnerability.
   Reference: <http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/edabe438-542f-11db-a5ae-00508d6a62df.html>
=> Please update your ports tree and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/php5.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade.4193.0 env PORT_UPGRADE=yes make
** Fix the problem and try again.
--->  Build of lang/php5 ended at: Fri, 13 Oct 2006 16:32:33 +0000 (consumed 00:00:17)
--->  Upgrade of lang/php5 ended at: Fri, 13 Oct 2006 16:32:33 +0000 (consumed 00:00:17)
--->  ** Upgrade tasks 1: 0 done, 0 ignored, 0 skipped and 1 failed
--->  Listing the results (+:done / -:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! lang/php5 (php5-5.1.6)        (unknown build error)
--->  Packages processed: 0 done, 0 ignored, 0 skipped and 1 failed
--->  Session ended at: Fri, 13 Oct 2006 16:32:33 +0000 (consumed 00:00:26)

I try to deinstall the php5
r00t#cd /use/ports/lang/php5
r00t#make deinstall clean

and its deinstall just fine.
I update my ports.
and now I try to install it and I get the same error all the time.

r00t@/usr/ports/lang/php5#make install
===>  php5-5.1.6_1 has known vulnerabilities:
=> php -- open_basedir Race Condition Vulnerability.
   Reference: <http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/edabe438-542f-11db-a5ae-00508d6a62df.html>
=> Please update your ports tree and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/php5.


Please help me ASAP.
I mast using PHP5.

thank you.
